title: Saudi-Arabian Tripe Stew Fondue
description: A unique crowd-pleaser featuring tripe, lamination puff, and a rich cheese pull. Traditionally served in a fondue pot over low heat, ideal for communal dining.

ingredients.name: Tripe
ingredients.notes: Rinsed and cleaned tripe, cut into 1-inch pieces.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.notes: Shredded Arab cheese or substitute with a similar type.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a fondue pot over low heat.
Add the onion and garlic, cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Add the cumin, coriander, and paprika, cook for 1 minute stirring constantly.
Add the tripe, cook for 10 minutes until browned, stirring occasionally.
Add the cheese, yogurt, salt, and black pepper, stir until the cheese is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Serve the tripe stew fondue warm, allowing guests to dip their choice of bread or vegetables.
